_comment: PR 4.B.3 (Wave 4 Track B) — L7 plugin boundary violation baseline.
_captured: 2026-05-14 — L7 gate false-positive fix + ratchet down (OI-033). Prior: 2026-05-03 Wave-A14 S118 corrected from Wave-12 aspirational 0.
_discipline: Ratchet DOWN only. This file records the maximum allowed violation file count per plugin. PRs that increase any plugin's count HARD-FAIL the boundary-lint-l7 gate. Decrease counts as plugins migrate to @pryzm/plugin-sdk.
_note: Baseline re-captured 2026-05-14 (OI-033). The check-l7-boundary.ts gate was using `rg -l` which matched the blocked package names ANYWHERE in a file — including JSDoc comments that explicitly say 'we do NOT import @pryzm/foo directly.' This inflated violation counts with false positives. Fix: gate now uses content-mode rg (no -l), then filters each matched line in TypeScript to exclude comment lines (// * /* #). Only lines beginning with a real `import` (not `import type`) or `export … from` statement are counted. After the fix, 22 plugins improved: 17 went to 0 (pure comment false positives), 5 improved partially (wall 5→4, toy-cube 3→1, geospatial 2→1, annotations 28→26, plan-view 4→0, ifc-export 4→0, sheets 2→0, multiplayer 2→0, bcf 2→0). totalFiles corrected from stale 90 to 84 (= sum of current perPlugin values). The prior Wave-A14 baseline of 90 was set before Sprint C raised annotations from 1→28; the sum of per-plugin values was 117 but totalFiles was never updated — the gate output showed misleading '116 of 90 … -26 resolved' arithmetic. Both issues are now resolved.
_wave12_note: Wave 12 (S98-S100) set all to 0 (aspirational). Wave A14 S118 audit (2026-05-03) found partial migration; baseline corrected to empirical state. 2026-05-14 OI-033: gate false-positive fix + ratchet down from 90/117 to 84 (true import count).
